CVE-2023-31486.title: HTTP::Tiny before 0.083, a Perl core module since 5.13.9 and avai ...
CVE-2023-31486.summary: HTTP::Tiny before 0.083, a Perl core module since 5.13.9 and available standalone on CPAN, has an insecure default TLS configuration where users must opt in to verify certificates.
